abilities.description: CARDNAME gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to activate this ability, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME instead.

effect.description: CARDNAME gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to activate this ability, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME instead.
